title: Structure Expansion
description: Small mod that Increases the size limit of structure blocks and fill command
body:
Small mod that Increases the size limit of the vanilla structure blocks  


### As of version 1801.1.1 we now also expand the limit of the fill command!



Version 1.16.5-1.0.5 and below:

    Increases the size limit of the structure block from 48x48x48 to 127x127x127  

Version 1.16.5-1.0.6 and above

    Increases the size limit of the structure block from 48x48x48 to 256x256x256  
    Added command to remove air blocks from structure files:
    /structure clean <name> 
    (if structure is saved as 123 then name would be 123 if saved as sunekaer:123 name would be "sunekaer:123")


[![http://partners.creeper.host/sunekaerjzn](https://i.imgur.com/vjIfqv5.png "")](http://partners.creeper.host/sunekaerjzn)
